The '''''Revenant''''' was the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] of [[Sol Sixxa]]. It was equipped with a prototype [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] by [[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]] similar to that used on the [[Scimitar/Legends|''Scimitar'']]. [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] rammed the ship with the ''[[Sunrunner]]'', sinking both vessels and destroying many [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s.

{{Ship-stub}}
